titleStmt.title: SII 26.698: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 698. (A.R. No. 651 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Tribhº Vikramachōḷadēva: Year 13, Kaṟkaṭaka (Āḍi) ba. (the tithi is omitted), Puṉarpūsam = 1130 A.D., July 6. The tithi was ba. 14.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places and its continuation is not traceable. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmādu puṇara, etc.

It records that the various groups of servants like the dēvakaṉmis, Śrīmāyēśvarakkaṅkāṇis, sabhaikkaṅkāṇis and the [Jagaṉa] doing people of the temple of the god Tirunalamuḍaiyār of Tirunalam, a Brahmadēyam, in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, received a gift of land in the, year 5 of the reign in Dhanus (Mārgaḻi) ba. 4, Wednesday, Maraiyūrai (?) made by a certain Āritaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ Tilaināyakaṉ of the same place, to provide for food and other offerings to the god from the month of Tai. It states that the tenants of the gift-land left the place not being able to pay their dues to the temple and that therefore the temple services were perhaps suspended. To remedy this situation the above-mentioned groups of temple servants received the gift of paddy from a certain Śīnāyakan in the month of Aṟpagai and had agreed to provide the offerings to the god as well as arrange to feed a Śivaśōgi (Śivayōgi) everyday in the temple from out of the interest on the gift paddy.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmā
tu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilavat tan
tiruppātamalar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉ
ṉiya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi
cūṭi ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum
vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippakka
liṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅ koḷāḻi
varai Ūḻi naṭātti Iricuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai ni
ḻaṟṟiya virasiṅṅācaṉattut tirupuvaṉamuṭaiyā
ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa ti
ribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟku
yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu tanuṟnāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattup pu
tankiḻamaiyum caturttiyum peṟṟa maraiyūrattu nā
ḷ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu bra
hmadeyam tirunalattu Uṭaiyār tirunalamuṭaiyār koyi
lil tevakaṉmikaḷum śrīmāyeśvarak kaṅkāṇicey
vārkaḷum sabhaikkaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum jakaṉa
ceyvārkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr Āritaṉ tirucciṟṟa
mpalamuṭaiyāṉ tillaināyakaṉukku Upaiya bramāṇam paṇṇikku
ṭutta paricāvatu Itteva tasi veḷḷam Oru pāṭṭanilaṅ
kaḷukku Ūrile Antarāyakka pala It tirucciṟṟampala
muṭaiyān tillaināyakaṉ dhanmatānamāka Ivvāṭṭai taimāsattu ko ka
nellu toṇṇūṟṟuk kalane tū ttuvāy mukkuṟuṇi palicai povatākavum � li
yāl vanta I 2 100 kku taimāsa mutal pavūṟna Amā vāsi neyyuḻa
kku ney 4 kku I 1(1/2) 9 Itan kiḻakku paṇṇi I māka kāppu Arici nta § nta 7 10 4kku
n=takku I māka kāppu Arici I nta 7 10 4 10 1 mukkālkku I ntayum mañcaḷ kā 2 1000 kku I 100 10 3
nta 7 10 4 kkum Āṭi Amutuceytaruḷukaikku kku mutu 2 1000kku I nta kaṟiyamutu 2 10 5 tukku I
�-nta Uppamutukku I nta miḷakamutukku I 2 nta neyyamutukku I sa- yiramutu 2 kku I Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku I 2
Ilaiyamutukku I 1muntiri tirumeṟpūccuk(ka)ku I ç 2 ri santi viḷakku 1 kku I 2 Āka māsam 10 2 kku I 4 1000 100 8 10
� ¬ nta
Ittevarkke yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai peṟṟa puṉarpūcattunāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmateyam tirunalattu
Uṭaiyār tirunalamuṭaiyār koyilukku rājakaṇkāṇi cevattiya kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum saru ta ka naṭakkum śrīmāyecurakkaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr Āritan tiriciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān tillaināyakanukku Upaiyapiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Itteva tevatā
nakkuṭikaḷ niccayipinpaṭi nellu Iṟukkamāṭṭātu Oṭipakeṭamaikkum nelvacaiyāka Aṭuttapātalālum varicaippaṭi Antarāyattukkum tevarūrkaḷ Antarāyattukkum tevarkaṭamaikkum Uṭal potāmaiyālum kācukku nelleṟi kiṭantamaiyālum tevar paṇṭārattu tiruppaṭimāṟṟu celutta pali
rai lum Inta Āritan tiricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāntittu nāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭavomāl sināyakan pakkal Ivvāṭṭai Aṟpakai mā nai7 1000 100 7 10 1 � Immāsamutal Innellukku kalattuvāyt tūṇi nānāḻi nellup palicai polivatākavum polinta palicaiyāl vanta nellu
muppatin kalam Ippalicai nellu muppatin kalattu civacoki Oruvanukku Arici Irunāḻikaikkum Uccip potai cantiyil cipalicevikkum ku nel Aiñāḻiyum Ilaikkaṟivaṟkkam Onṟukkum miḷaku kaṟi Onṟukkum miḷakukkum Uppu
nāḷ Onṟukku nellu kuṟuṇiyāka nāḷ munnūṟṟu Aṟupattu civacoki Oruvaṉai Amutu cevipatakku nellu 4 10 tin kalamum Ippalicai cevikkak kaṭavomāka Inta Āritan tiricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān
ceyvarum tevarkanmikaḷu māṇimāyecurakkaṅkāṇikaḷum kaṅkāṇiḷuyvarāḷum Iva ceyvārkaḷum māṭapattiya kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.698 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
